get.summary: Return the current health status of the backend and ping the storage backend.
Return the current pairing workflow status for public clients.
Return the high-level phase the game is currently in.
Return the question currently being played and progress made so far.
Return the teams currently participating in the game.
Stream admin-only events, establishing or validating the admin token.

200.description: Admin SSE stream with authentication token

503.description: Admin stream already in use (single connection enforced)

get.summary: Stream realtime public events to connected frontends.

200.description: Public SSE stream with real-time game events

get.summary: Upgrade the HTTP connection into a buzzer WebSocket session.

ActionResponse.description: Generic action acknowledgement used by admin endpoints.

message.description: Human-readable message describing the action result.

AnswerFoundRequest.description: Request to mark an answer as found.

answer_id.description: ID identifying the answer within the question.

question_id.description: ID of the question containing the answer.

AnswerValidationEvent.description: Broadcast when an answer has been validated or invalidated.

question_id.description: ID of the question being validated.

AnswersFoundResponse.description: Response summarising the answers found for the current question.

answers_ids.description: List of answer IDs that have been found.

BlindTestAnswerInput.description: Blindtest answer details required for a question.

is_bonus.description: Whether this answer is a bonus answer.

key.description: Unique key identifying this answer field.

points.description: Points awarded for finding this answer.

BlindTestAnswerSnapshot.description: Snapshot of a blindtest answer exposed to public runtime consumers.

is_bonus.description: Whether this answer is a bonus answer.

key.description: Unique key identifying this answer field.

points.description: Points awarded for finding this answer.

is_bonus.description: Whether this answer is a bonus answer.

key.description: Unique key identifying this answer field.

points.description: Points awarded for finding this answer.

BlindTestQuestionInput.description: Blindtest question details required to populate a sequence.

starts_at_ms.description: Start time in milliseconds for media playback.

BlindTestQuestionSnapshot.description: Snapshot of a blindtest question exposed to public runtime consumers.

starts_at_ms.description: Start time in milliseconds for playback.
Start time in milliseconds for playback.

oneOf.description: Buzzer identifies itself with an ID.

id.description: Unique identifier for the buzzer device.
Unique identifier for the buzzer device.

BuzzerInboundMessage.description: Messages accepted from buzzer WebSocket clients.

CreateGameRequest.description: Payload describing how to spin up a game from an existing questions sequence.

name.description: Display name for the new game.

questions_sequence_id.description: ID of the questions sequence to use for this game.

teams.description: List of teams participating in the game.

CreateGameWithQuestionsSequenceRequest.description: Payload used to bootstrap a brand-new game instance with an inline questions sequence.

name.description: Display name for the new game.

questions_sequence.description: Questions sequence definition for the game.

teams.description: List of teams participating in the game.

CreateTeamRequest.description: Request payload to create a new team during the prep phase.

CurrentQuestionResponse.description: Response describing the question currently being played and progress made so far.

GameListItem.description: Minimal projection of a game when listed for administrators.

created_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the game was created.

teams.description: Brief summaries of teams in the game.

updated_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the game was last updated.

GamePhaseResponse.description: Response exposing the game's global phase as seen by the public.

GamePhaseSnapshot.description: Shared snapshot describing the current gameplay phase and related context.

answers_ids.description: Present during playing/reveal phases to expose answer IDs already found.

degraded.description: True when the backend operates in degraded mode (no connexion to database).

game_id.description: ID of the active game (if any).

hints_ids.description: Present during playing/reveal phases to expose hint IDs already revealed.

pairing_team_id.description: Present during prep_pairing phase to indicate the active team.

paused_buzzer.description: Present during pause phase for buzz-induced pauses to expose the buzzer identifier.

oneOf.description: Present during playing/reveal phases to expose the current question.

scoreboard.description: Present during scores phase to display the final scores.

GameSummary.description: Summary returned once a game has been created or loaded.

created_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the game was created.

current_question_index.description: Index of the current question being played (if any).

questions_sequence.description: Summary of the questions sequence used in the game.

teams.description: List of teams in the game.

updated_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the game was last updated.

Handshake.description: Initial metadata sent to an SSE client when it connects.

degraded.description: Whether the backend is running without a storage backend connection.

stream.description: Identifier of the SSE stream (`public` or `admin`).

token.description: Optional admin token returned when the stream is privileged.

HealthResponse.description: Simple health response returned by the `/healthcheck` route.

HintSnapshot.description: Snapshot of a question hint exposed to public runtime consumers.

LegacyCreateGameWithPlaylistRequest.description: Deprecated payload used to bootstrap a game with a legacy playlist.

name.description: Display name for the new game.

playlist.description: Legacy playlist definition for the game.

teams.description: List of teams participating in the game.

LegacyPlaylistInput.description: Deprecated playlist metadata supplied by legacy clients.

songs.description: List of songs in the playlist.

LegacyPlaylistListItem.description: Deprecated playlist projection returned by legacy playlist routes.

LegacyPointFieldInput.description: Deprecated point field details supplied by legacy clients.

points.description: Points awarded for finding this field.

LegacySongInput.description: Deprecated song details supplied by legacy clients.

starts_at_ms.description: Start time in milliseconds for the song playback.

url.description: URL of the song media file.

MultipleChoiceAnswerInput.description: Multiple-choice answer details required for a question.

MultipleChoiceAnswerSnapshot.description: Snapshot of a multiple-choice answer exposed to public runtime consumers.

MultipleChoiceQuestionInput.description: Multiple-choice question details required to populate a sequence.

url.description: Optional URL of a supporting media file.

MultipleChoiceQuestionSnapshot.description: Snapshot of a multiple-choice question exposed to public runtime consumers.

url.description: Optional URL of a supporting media file.
Optional URL of a supporting media file.

NextQuestionResponse.description: Response describing the state of the sequence after moving to the next question.

finished.description: Whether the sequence has been completed.

oneOf.description: Summary of the next question, if any.

OpenAnswerInput.description: Open answer details required for a question.

OpenAnswerSnapshot.description: Snapshot of an open answer exposed to public runtime consumers.

OpenQuestionInput.description: Open question details required to populate a sequence.

url.description: Optional URL of a supporting media file.

OpenQuestionSnapshot.description: Snapshot of an open question exposed to public runtime consumers.

url.description: Optional URL of a supporting media file.
Optional URL of a supporting media file.

PairingAssignedEvent.description: Event emitted when a buzzer has been assigned during pairing.

buzzer_id.description: ID of the buzzer that was assigned.

team_id.description: ID of the team that was paired.

PairingRestoredEvent.description: Event emitted when pairing is aborted and teams restored.

snapshot.description: Snapshot of teams restored to their pre-pairing state.

PairingStatusResponse.description: Public response describing the state of the pairing workflow.

team_id.description: ID of the team currently pairing (if any).

PairingWaitingEvent.description: Event emitted when the pairing workflow awaits the next team.

team_id.description: ID of the team that should pair their buzzer.

PhaseChangedEvent.description: Broadcast whenever the gameplay phase changes.

QuestionFoundAnswersEvent.description: Broadcast when answers have been marked as found.

answers_ids.description: IDs of answers that have been found.

question_id.description: ID of the question containing the answers.

QuestionHintRequest.description: Request to reveal a hint for a question.

hint_id.description: ID identifying the hint within the question.

question_id.description: ID of the question containing the hint.

QuestionHintsEvent.description: Broadcast when question hints have been revealed.

hints_ids.description: IDs of hints that have been revealed.

question_id.description: ID of the question containing the hints.

QuestionHintsResponse.description: Response summarising the hints revealed for the current question.

hints_ids.description: List of hint IDs that have been revealed.

QuestionSnapshot.description: Snapshot of a question including answer metadata.

QuestionSummary.description: Summary of a single question within a sequence.

QuestionValidation.description: Tri-state result of a question validation.

QuestionValidationRequest.description: Request to submit the current question validation using a tri-state result.

question_id.description: ID of the question being validated.

valid.description: Validation result for the question answer submission.

QuestionsSequenceInput.description: Questions sequence metadata and questions supplied when bootstrapping a game.

name.description: Display name for the questions sequence.

questions.description: List of questions in the sequence.

QuestionsSequenceListItem.description: Minimal projection of a questions sequence available for game creation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the questions sequence.

name.description: Display name of the questions sequence.

QuestionsSequenceSummary.description: Summary of a questions sequence including all questions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the questions sequence.

name.description: Display name of the questions sequence.

questions.description: List of questions in the sequence.

ScoreAdjustmentRequest.description: Request to adjust a team's score by a delta.

ScoreUpdateResponse.description: Result of a score adjustment, returning the updated tally.

team_id.description: ID of the team whose score was updated.

StartGameResponse.description: Response emitted when a game starts, including the initial question details.

question.description: Summary of the first question in the game.

StartPairingRequest.description: Request payload to start a buzzer pairing session.

first_team_id.description: ID of the first team to pair their buzzer.

StopGameResponse.description: Response returned when a game is stopped, gathering final team scores.

teams.description: Final scores and details for all teams.

SystemStatus.description: Broadcast when the backend enters or leaves degraded mode.

degraded.description: Whether the system is in degraded mode.

TeamBriefSummary.description: Brief team information without score or color.

TeamColorDto.description: HSV representation shared by DTOs (REST, SSE, WS).

TeamCreatedEvent.description: Event emitted when a new team is created.

TeamDeletedEvent.description: Event emitted when a team has been deleted.

team_id.description: ID of the team that was deleted.

TeamInput.description: Incoming team definition for the game bootstrap.

buzzer_id.description:
If not specified, does not change it (or lets the back use the default value).
If null is specified, removes the buzzer ID.
If a string is specified, sets the buzzer ID to this string.

color.description:
Optional HSV color. If omitted, the backend chooses the first unused color from the
configured colors set.

score.description: Initial score for the team (defaults to 0 if omitted).

TeamSummary.description: Public projection of a team exposed to REST/SSE clients.

buzzer_id.description: ID of the buzzer assigned to this team.

color.description: HSV color assigned to the team.

TeamUpdatedEvent.description: Event emitted when an existing team was updated (name, buzzer, or score).

team.description: The updated team with new information.

TeamsResponse.description: Response payload listing the teams currently loaded in memory.

teams.description: List of teams in the active game.

TestBuzzEvent.description: Event emitted when a buzzer buzzes during prep ready mode.

team_id.description: ID of the team whose buzzer was pressed.

UpdateTeamRequest.description: Request payload to update an existing team in the active game.

VisibleGamePhase.description: Publicly visible game phase exposed to clients (REST/SSE).

tags.name: public
tags.description: Public read-only projections for the current game state
